# Skills moved

Project skills now live under [`.claude/skills/`](../../.claude/skills/) so Claude Code auto-discovers them as invocable slash commands (`/tdd-workflow`, `/security-scan`, `/release`).

| Skill | New location |
|---|---|
| `tdd-workflow` | [`.claude/skills/tdd-workflow/SKILL.md`](../../.claude/skills/tdd-workflow/SKILL.md) |
| `security-scan` | [`.claude/skills/security-scan/SKILL.md`](../../.claude/skills/security-scan/SKILL.md) |
| `release` | [`.claude/skills/release/SKILL.md`](../../.claude/skills/release/SKILL.md) |

GitHub Copilot Chat and other agents that read `AGENTS.md` will pick up the new paths from there.
